upload.title: Upload Medical Report
upload.description: Upload X-rays, MRI scans, CT scans, blood reports, or any medical document for AI analysis
upload.clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag & drop
upload.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g., Chest X-ray for suspected pneumonia
upload.uploadError: Please upload an image or PDF file

analysis.title: Analysis Results
analysis.analyzingSubtext: Using Computer Vision to detect anomalies
analysis.uploadPrompt: Upload a medical report to begin AI analysis
analysis.disclaimer: ⚠ This is an AI-assisted analysis. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical decisions.

vitalSigns.title: Vital Signs Monitoring
vitalSigns.noData: No vital signs data yet. Start tracking your health metrics.
vitalSigns.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all vital signs data? This action cannot be undone.
vitalSigns.resetSuccess: All vital signs data has been reset successfully.
vitalSigns.resetFailed: Failed to reset vital signs data.

export.title: Export PDF Report
export.description: Generate a comprehensive PDF report of your medical history and analysis results

nearbyServices.title: Nearby Medical Services
nearbyServices.description: Find hospitals, ambulance services, and pharmacies near you
nearbyServices.locationPlaceholder: Or type a city / address (e.g., New York, Mumbai)
nearbyServices.setLocationDescription: Use GPS or type an address above to find nearby medical services
nearbyServices.noResults: No results found. Try searching a different location.
nearbyServices.geolocationNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser
nearbyServices.locationPermissionDenied: Location permission denied. Please enable location access in your browser settings.
nearbyServices.locationUnavailable: Location information is unavailable. Please try manual search.
nearbyServices.locationTimeout: Location request timed out. Please try again or use manual search.
nearbyServices.locationNotFound: Location not found. Try a more specific address.
nearbyServices.noResultsNearby: No results found nearby. Try a different location or category.
nearbyServices.failedToFetchPlaces: Failed to fetch nearby places. Please try again.

medicalTools.title: AI Medical Tools
medicalTools.description: Get AI-powered insights on symptoms, diseases, and medicines
medicalTools.symptomPlaceholder: Describe symptoms, e.g. 'headache, fever, body ache for 3 days'
medicalTools.medicinePlaceholder: Enter a medicine name, e.g. 'Ibuprofen' or 'Amoxicillin'
medicalTools.symptomDescription: Describe your symptoms or a disease to get AI-powered medicine and remedy suggestions
medicalTools.medicineDescription: Enter a medicine name to learn about its uses, side effects, and interactions
medicalTools.disclaimer: ⚠ AI-generated content. Always consult a healthcare professional before taking any medication.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Manage your personal and medical information
profile.medicalInfoDescription: Important health details for better diagnostics
